content: I'm really confused about your input section because it doesn't match your stub generator and test cases. Please fix (sorry if you were doing that already)

The "noise" characters mentioned in the Goal section might be referring to the irrelevant descriptions 😅

A few additional areas to fix, on top of what @VinceMC already pointed out:

Goal / Input / Output
* There's no need to repeat "Goal", "Input" and "Output" within the descriptions. Please remove those headings.

Formatting
* Please study the formatting syntax on this page: https://www.codingame.com/playgrounds/40701/help-center/statement (including the full example there), and format your statement properly as described in the points below.

Input
* Please add "space-separated" before "integers".

* Please format all line numbers in <<bold>> (e.g. <<Line 1>>).

Input / Constraints
* Please format all [[variables]] (e.g. [[W]]).

* Please keep variable names consistent throughout different sections. Use either [[W]] and [[H]], or [[w]] and [[h]].

Cases
* Please modify Validator 2 to use the same inputs as Test 2 because 1 1 is an edge case.

* Please add a new pair of cases where W < H.

Thanks.

Actually, I'm starting to understand your clash better, and it's similar to a tortoise vs hare racetrack clash that I've played before. Maybe if you add this in your goal section, it can make your puzzle easier to understand:
<<Example:>>
```
ooooo   Width: 5
o---o   Height: 3
ooooo   Characters: 12
```
Adding an example would be good, but it's also important for the author to rewrite the existing statement and remove everything that's irrelevant to the task.
